meaning: Cellular Digital Packet Data,蜂窝数字式数据包
examples: CDPD is currently regarded as the best wireless data communications.
This paper introduces the mobility management protocol of the CDPD system.
CDPD networks make use of current AMPS networks to transfer radio packet data.
Cell phones and CDPD cards can connect to standard notebook PCs for the cost of a cable, software and service.
